reply_text: 😑​ this comment is 4 months ago anyways you missed how the game will really be played. The game is a jump rope game that involves 2 dolls holding the rope. Players will enter on the girl door. Players must choose one player to go first into the track they're goal is to reach the boy side or the other side players have to step into the track. When the light turns RED they are allowed to go forward but when the light turns GREEN they must stop and do the jump rope where if they fail they'll die, when it turns RED again the jump rope will stop and they are allowed to go forward, they have to do it over and over again until they reached the other side where the exit door is located behind the boy doll.@ykmimo
